untranslatable_reason: Pattern detection (Double Top formation identification) and dynamic target calculation (pattern height measurement divided by 2, subtracted from confirmation line) cannot be expressed using only the allowed indicators. These require historical peak/trough detection and multi-bar pattern recognition not available in the indicator set. The Donchian Channel (dc_lower) approximates the confirmation line concept but does not capture the precise two-top structure validation.
translation_notes: Used dc_lower as a proxy for the confirmation line (lowest low between two tops) and pivot as a reasonable reversal exit point. The core pattern detection logic is untranslatable without explicit pattern recognition capabilities. The 65% probability warning about early exits and 69% target hit rate are informational only and cannot be codified as hard rules. Stop loss set conservatively at 2.5% given the 8% failure rate within 5% moves.
